question_en: My child is in a Govt College in CG. Can we get the BPL Scholarship in 2026?
question_hi_hinglish: Mera baccha Chhattisgarh ke Govt College mein hai. Kya humein 2026 mein BPL Scholarship mil sakti hai?
answer_en: Yes! If you have a valid BPL card, your child can get ₹300/month for UG and ₹500/month for PG through the State Scholarship Portal. Ensure their Aadhaar is seeded with their bank account. It is a great way to cover daily expenses like books and travel.
answer_hi_hinglish: Ji haan! Agar aapke paas BPL card hai, toh UG students ko ₹300 aur PG ko ₹500 mahina milta hai. Bas dhyan rakhein ki Aadhaar bank account se link ho. Ye kitab aur aane-jane ke kharche ke liye bahut acchi madad hai.

question_en: I see Blinkit and Ekart opening in Durg and Bilaspur. Are these good jobs for my son?
question_hi_hinglish: Durg aur Bilaspur mein Blinkit aur Ekart khul rahe hain. Kya ye mere bete ke liye acchi job hai?
answer_en: These are part of the 'Quick Commerce' boom. While delivery is one part, they also hire 'Store Supervisors' and 'Logistics Assistants' in their dark stores. These roles offer stable pay and are excellent entry points into the massive supply chain industry without moving to a metro.
answer_hi_hinglish: Ye 'Quick Commerce' ka zamana hai. Sirf delivery hi nahi, inke stores mein 'Supervisor' aur 'Logistics' ki jobs bhi milti hain. Ye stable jobs hain aur bina bade sheher gaye supply chain industry mein career shuru karne ka accha mauka hain.

question_en: My daughter wants to be a Video Editor from home. Is there any future in it?
question_hi_hinglish: Meri beti ghar se Video Editor banna chahti hai. Kya isme koi future hai?
answer_en: Huge future! In 2026, every business needs video. A skilled Video Editor can earn ₹20k-50k per month from home by working for YouTubers or companies in Raipur and beyond. It is a highly creative and safe desk job for women.
answer_hi_hinglish: Bahut bada future hai! Aaj har business ko video ki zaroorat hai. Ek accha editor ghar baithe YouTubers ya companies ke liye kaam karke ₹20k-50k kama sakta hai. Ye ladkiyon ke liye ek safe aur creative 'desk job' hai.

question_en: My child is addicted to mobile gaming. Will this destroy their career?
question_hi_hinglish: Mera baccha din bhar mobile gaming mein laga rehta hai. Kya isse uska career kharab ho jayega?
answer_en: Excessive gaming can hurt studies, but the skill behind it (logic and fast thinking) is valuable. Instead of banning it, encourage them to learn 'Game Development' or 'Coding.' Turn their addiction into a skill. 2026 has a huge demand for people who build these games, not just play them.
answer_hi_hinglish: Zyada gaming padhai ke liye buri hai, lekin iske piche ka dimaag (logic) kaam ka hai. Use band karne ke bajaye bacche ko 'Game Design' ya 'Coding' seekhne ko kahein. Khelne wale se zyada game 'Banane' wale ki demand aur salary 2026 mein bahut zyada hai.

question_en: My son has spent 3 years preparing for SSC but hasn't cleared it. Should he continue?
question_hi_hinglish: Mera beta 3 saal se SSC ki taiyari kar raha hai par clear nahi hua. Kya use jari rakhna chahiye?
answer_en: 3 years is a long time. In 2026, many corporate roles (like Operations or Sales) value the same aptitude skills. We suggest he takes a 'Skill-based job' now and keeps preparing for exams in his free time. Don't let his gap years increase; a job provides confidence that an exam might take years to give.
answer_hi_hinglish: 3 saal kaafi hote hain. 2026 mein private jobs mein bhi wahi aptitude pucha jata hai jo SSC mein. Use ab koi job shuru kar deni chahiye aur sath mein exam dena chahiye. 'Gap years' badhne se confidence kam ho jata hai, job se stability aati hai.

question_en: Is it better for my daughter to work in a local bank or a tech company in Raipur?
question_hi_hinglish: Meri beti ke liye local bank mein kaam karna accha hai ya Raipur ki kisi tech company mein?
answer_en: Both are good, but Tech companies often offer better growth and 'Work from Home' flexibility. In Raipur, the IT sector is growing fast. If she wants a long-term career after marriage, a tech skill (like HR or Digital Marketing) is more flexible than a traditional bank branch job.
answer_hi_hinglish: Dono acche hain, par tech companies mein salary jaldi badhti hai aur 'Work from Home' mil sakta hai. Raipur mein IT sector badh raha hai. Shaadi ke baad bhi career jari rakhne ke liye tech skills (jaise HR ya Digital Marketing) zyada flexible hoti hain.

question_en: Is ITI still a good option in 2026 for students in Korba?
question_hi_hinglish: Kya 2026 mein Korba ke students ke liye ITI ek accha option hai?
answer_en: Yes, but choose 'New Age Trades.' Instead of just Fitter/Turner, look for **EV Mechanic** or **Drone Technician**. Korba’s industrial belt and the rise of Electric Vehicles mean these skills will be in highest demand for the next 10 years.
answer_hi_hinglish: Ji haan, par 'purane trades' ke bajaye **EV Mechanic** ya **Drone Technician** chuniye. Korba ke industries aur Electric Vehicles ke aane se in skills ki demand agle 10 saal tak sabse zyada rahegi.

question_en: Everyone is talking about AI. Does my child need to be a genius to learn it?
question_hi_hinglish: Sab AI ki baat kar rahe hain. Kya mere bacche ko genius hona zaroori hai ise seekhne ke liye?
answer_en: Not at all! Learning AI today is like learning how to use a mobile phone. It is a 'tool.' Even a B.Com or Arts student can learn to use AI to do their work faster. Knowing how to use AI will be a basic requirement for every job by 2027.
answer_hi_hinglish: Bilkul nahi! AI seekhna aaj mobile chalane jaisa hai. Ye ek 'tool' hai. B.Com ya Arts ka student bhi AI use karke apna kaam jaldi kar sakta hai. 2027 tak har job mein AI ki basic jankari hona zaroori ho jayega.
